## User need

What barrier, bug, or research workflow does this change address?

## Change

What does the pull request change?

## Core and compatibility

- [ ] This is an interface-only adaptation that preserves core meanings.
- [ ] This changes a main function and documents compatibility or migration behavior.
- [ ] Existing projects and unrelated user changes are preserved.

## Privacy

- [ ] No real manuscript, paper, bibliography, submission record, credential, agent conversation, or private research data is included.
- [ ] Screenshots and fixtures use synthetic content.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test:syntax`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:public`
- [ ] Relevant keyboard, dark-mode, zoom, touch, or screen-reader behavior was checked.

## Remaining uncertainty

What should reviewers test or question?
